title: Bowl Ore Mod
description: An ore generation mod that allows you to obtain bowls via smeltable ores..
body:
A mod that makes bowls obtainable via mining bowl ore.

### Items & Blocks Added
- Bowl Ore
- Deepslate Bowl Ore
- Raw Bowl

### To Obtain Bowls
The process is quite literally the same as how you would obtain smeltable ingots.
1. Mine bowl ore with a stone pickaxe or higher
2. Smelt the obtained "Raw Bowl" into a bowl using a furnace

(Most assets and code based largely from Kaupenjoe)
